creator: bf1783@googlemail.com
text:
Both security/tor and security/tor-devel were updated to the latest
upstream versions a few hours after they were released:

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/security/tor/

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/security/tor-devel/

Before filing a PR, it is a good idea to check the main repository to
see if the problem has been fixed, because sometimes it takes a while
for the change to propagate to all of the mirrors.

Regards,
                  b.
